ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-26-2016 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-28-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Judith Baer for and with (Administrator) Cheryl Lea Salem.

The Court stated that this is a request to extend the administration for 1 year based on statements regarding remodeling and expanding the property and creating a special needs trust (SNT), that no estate tax is due and that the estate should have been closed in 1 year. Ms. Salem reported that when the parents died the kids were minors, that there was no guardian to take possession of the property, that one child was in foster care, that the decedent's siblings were renting the house, that there were complications, that there were liens and unpaid taxes that had to be taken care of, that the girls are now 19 & 20 years old and want to live in the house, that the administrator has been trying to preserve the property for them, that the girls are of legal age but not capable of managing assets, that a SNT will be necessary and that the father wanted them to live in the house. Ms. Baer stated that Ms. Salem has spent time and energy to improve the house, that there is rental income, that if the estate is closed now and distributed to the girls the house would be lost, that one of the girls has issues and that when the remodel is complete the girls will live there. Ms. Salem stated that the property manager has stepped down, that the girls are legally adults, that they do not have much earning power, that they would like to hold distribution for one year to preserve it and that the girls need legal structures. The Court stated that the role of administrator is to distribute the estate pursuant to the Probate Code. Ms. Baer stated that both girls need and have asked for the administrator's help, that there are equitable concerns here and that the father would want them to have the house when they would be able to handle it. Ms. Salem stated that the girls are on benefits and will lose them if they get the distribution. The Court denied the status report and set a status on filing a Petition for Final Distribution on July 26, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Boncato. (Not Reported)
